failures.description: The agent fabricated/altered the result during answer synthesis by replacing the grounded tool result of 4 matching items with an unsupported claim of 11 options and a nonexistent record 0000000000.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available bamboo-deck skateboards costing more than $194.56. The tool result at index 3 returned exactly 4 matching items with item IDs and prices. At index 4, the Executor answered that there are 11 options and cited record 0000000000, neither of which appears in the user request, plan, or tool output. This unsupported count and record were then used as the final answer. The later Evaluator approval at index 5 did not resolve the error.
